sqlMap.select:
select count(a.id) from i_assign_signfor_t a left join i_information_assign_t b on a.assignid = b.id where a.validflag > 0
a.assignid = $assignid$
a.receiveid = $receiveid$
a.validflag = $validflag$
(b.assigntitle like '%$assigntitle$%')
(b.assigncontent like '%$assigncontent$%')
b.urgentflag = '$urgentflag$'
b.category = '$category$'

select a.*,b.informationid,b.assigntitle,b.assigncontent,b.signdepartment,b.signdepartids, b.instructions,b.judgeopinion,b.requirements,b.issuer,b.category,b.urgentflag,b.signlimit, b.feedbacklimit,b.attachments,b.departmentid,b.contactnumber,b.memo,c.departname as departmentname from i_assign_signfor_t a left join i_information_assign_t b on a.assignid = b.id left join sys_department_t c on b.departmentid = c.id where a.validflag > 0
a.assignid = $assignid$
a.receiveid = $receiveid$
a.validflag = $validflag$
(b.assigntitle like '%$assigntitle$%')
(b.assigncontent like '%$assigncontent$%')
b.urgentflag = '$urgentflag$'
b.category = '$category$'
order by id desc

select a.*,b.informationid,b.assigntitle,b.assigncontent,b.signdepartment,b.signdepartids, b.instructions,b.judgeopinion,b.requirements,b.issuer,b.category,b.urgentflag,b.signlimit, b.feedbacklimit,b.attachments,b.departmentid,b.contactnumber,b.memo,c.departname as departmentname from i_assign_signfor_t a left join i_information_assign_t b on a.assignid = b.id left join sys_department_t c on b.departmentid = c.id where a.id = $id$
sqlMap.update:
update i_assign_signfor_t set validflag = $validflag$
signoper = '$signoper$'
signtime = '$signtime$'
feedbackoper = '$feedbackoper$'
feedbacktime = '$feedbacktime$'
feedbackcontent = '$feedbackcontent$'
where id = $id$

update i_assign_signfor_t set validflag = 0 where assignid = $assignid$
receiveid in $idlist$
sqlMap.select:
select a.*,b.departname as receivename from i_assign_signfor_t a left join sys_department_t b on a.receiveid = b.id where a.validflag > 0
a.assignid = $assignid$
